affixs.detail: When the party has 2 or more Sweeper or Assassin allies, all allies' final damage is increased by 20%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: Party's Resonance critical damage is increased by 25% and Attack by 25%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: Whenever an ally deals damage, that ally's damage is increased by 4%. Lasts for 3 turns. Stacks up to 10 times.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: Assassin allies' damage is increased by 20%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: Allies are unable to deal critical hits, but deal increased final damage from skills and Resonances. This increase is equal to critical hit rate x (critical damage - 100%). (Max critical hit rate in this calculation is 100%).
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: When the party has 2 or more Sweeper or Assassin allies, all allies' final damage is increased by 20%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: When the party activates a Technical, Attack is increased by 25% and critical damage by 25%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: When the party deals Almighty dmg, increase dmg by 25%, and critical dmg by 25%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: Sweeper allies' damage is increased by 20%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: Allies are unable to deal critical hits, but deal increased final damage from skills and Resonances. This increase is equal to critical hit rate x (critical damage - 100%). (Max critical hit rate in this calculation is 100%).
affixs.name: Special Effect

mode.detail: The more Assassins and Sweepers you have in your party, the more the point multiplier will increase.
mode.name: Nexus of Dreams
